Paper Ideas

If you are interested in talking about a paper, please let us know by modifying this file (/papers_ideas.md) and opening a pull request.

  1. Distributed Systems
    • Time, Clocks and the Ordering of Events in a Distributed System
    • Paxos, Paxos simple
    • Raft
    • Bitcoin
  2. Linear logic, ownership types, and affine types
    • Linear Haskell
    • Ownership Type: A Survey
    • Ownership Types in Rust
  3. Formal Verification
    • Compcert
    • seL4
    • Forward and Backward Simulations
  4. Symbolic Verification of Cryptographic Protocols
  5. Property-based Testing
    • Property-Based Testing as Probabilistic Programming
  6. Compilers
    • The MLIR Paper - Abhiroop volunteers to present this, but maybe not at the earliest meetups
    • From System F to Typed Assembly Language
  7. Security (Attacks)
    • Meltdown / Spectre
    • ASLR on the Line: Practical Cache Attacks on the MMU
    • Return to libc
    • Rowhammer
    • Reflections on Trusting Trust - Abhiroop volunteers to present this
  8. Databases
  9. Concurrency Theory
    • Linearizability
    • Sequential Consistency versus Linearizability
  10. Machine Learning
    • The Simple Essence of Automatic Differentiation
    • Attention Is All You Need (The Transformers paper)
    • Automatic Differentiation in Machine Learning: A Survey
  11. Programming Language Theory
    • Definitional Interpreters for Higher-Order Programming Languages
    • Propositions as Types
Papers We Love Zürich
A Papers We Love chapter in Zürich, Switzerland.
